title: intense spicy tha snapper fish curry
description: spicy and flaky thai curry featuring snapper fish as the main ingredient. braised to perfection in a flavorful and aromatic sauce.
instructions: heat 2 tablespoons of canola oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the onion and cook until it's translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the snapper fish fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they're browned and cooked through.
remove the fish from the skillet and set it aside.
add the lemon juice, fish sauce, brown sugar, chili flakes, coriander powder, and cumin powder to the skillet. stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
add the coconut milk to the skillet and stir to combine.
return the fish to the skillet and simmer for 2-3 minutes, until it's coated in the sauce.
season the curry with salt and pepper to taste.
stir in the chopped cilantro and serve the curry immediately.
